nodes.label: Context writers — write learned patterns to agent-specific context files.  Write
Read an existing context file that we are about to rewrite as UTF-8.      These
Base class for writing recommendations to context/memory files.
Build the marker-delimited section content from recommendations.
Return the raw text of the headroom:learn marker block, or None.      Unlike _pa
Parse recommendations out of a prior marker block.      Returns [] if no marker
Union new recommendations with prior ones whose section is not re-surfaced.
Merge new recommendations with any existing marker block and rebuild the file.
Remove the headroom:learn marker block from text, tidying blank lines.      Used
Writes learned patterns to CLAUDE.local.md and MEMORY.md for Claude Code.      P
Override where CONTEXT_FILE recommendations are written.          Accepts a path
Move a stale headroom block out of CLAUDE.md into the new target.          Only
Writes learned patterns to AGENTS.md and instructions.md for Codex CLI.
Writes learned patterns to GEMINI.md for Gemini CLI.
